overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage transitioning from a daytime aerial overview of a floating ancient Mediterranean city to a nighttime boat approach through a classical harbor. The clip showcases detailed Greco-Roman stone architecture, water physics, and atmospheric lighting as the perspective shifts from high drone to water-level vessel.

segments.scene_description: High aerial drone shot reveals a sprawling ancient Mediterranean city built across islands and coastal rocks. The camera glides over calm waters toward a central rocky outcrop crowned with temple structures, while sailing vessels traverse the harbor below. The scene is bathed in bright afternoon sunlight with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor entrance with monumental pillars

agents.ego_description: navigating boat through the narrow harbor entrance between stone pillars, approaching the illuminated docks

notable_agents.action: small wooden boat moving ahead through the harbor channel toward the stone stairs

entered.detail: tall stone pillar with statue on top marking the left side of the harbor entrance
matching stone pillar with statue on the right side of the channel
classical stone structure with columns and lit windows along the waterfront
burning fire pits on the dock walls casting warm light on the water
grand stone stairs leading up from the water to the upper city levels

segments.scene_description: Nighttime boat-level approach to an ancient stone harbor, navigating between two monumental pillars topped with statues. The water reflects the warm glow of lit braziers lining the dock walls, revealing detailed classical architecture, stone staircases, and columned facades. The camera moves steadily forward through the narrow channel toward the illuminated waterfront buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide over a sprawling ancient Mediterranean city that transitions from a wide panoramic overview to a focused approach toward its central monuments. It begins high above the coast, revealing a network of islands and rocky outcrops crowned with classical stone architecture under a bright afternoon sun. As the camera descends, it glides over calm, shimmering waters where sailing vessels traverse the harbor below. The perspective then narrows, shifting from the vast cityscape toward a central rocky outcrop as the camera closes in on the detailed temple structures perched at the summit.

The shot follows a continuous boat-level approach through a nighttime harbor that draws closer to the illuminated heart of an ancient stone city. It begins by navigating a narrow channel, gliding between two monumental pillars topped with statues that frame the entrance. As the camera moves steadily forward, the dark water begins to mirror the warm glow of lit braziers lining the dock walls. The scene then opens up to reveal detailed classical architecture, with stone staircases and columned facades emerging from the shadows. Finally, the perspective pushes deeper into the harbor toward the brightly lit waterfront buildings.
